label: Ashvault Hab-Cell
description: Ashvault Hab-Cell is a compact residential compartment set within Cyrenth Bastion-City’s ferrocrete superstructure, its walls ribbed with void-black bracing and sealed service panels. A pressure-rated hatch and gasketed vents define the space’s quarantine-ready design, while recessed lumen strips cast a cold, regulated light. Built-in bunks and stowage lockers line one wall, their surfaces scoured for easy decontamination and marked by standardized tally slates. The air carries the dry tang of recycled filtration, and the only ornament is utilitarian: ration niches, tool hooks, and a small vox alcove set into the bulkhead.
